Skip to content
Ocean Wise
Open Mobile Navigation
Join the Ocean Wise team. Have an incredible career. Do work that matters.
Opportunities at Ocean Wise
We need the ocean. The ocean needs us.

Ocean Wise is a Canadian conservation organization with global impact. We believe that together, with people just like you, we can achieve our vision of a world in which the ocean is healthy and thriving .

Ocean Wise is based in the traditional and unceded territory of the Coast Salish Peoples, including the territories of the xÊ·mÉ™Î¸kwÉ™yÌ“É™m (Musqueam), Skwxwú7mesh (Squamish), and SÉ™lÌ“ílwÉ™taÊ”/Selilwitulh (Tsleil-Waututh) Nations. We work across Turtle Island and beyond, supporting Indigenous peoples in their vital work on ocean conservation and biodiversity whenever possible or as we are invited to.

Ocean Wise is a global conservation organization on a mission to build communities that take meaningful action to protect and restore our ocean.
